name: prax-resume
description: Resume — Prakhar Shekhar Parthasarthi. Static HTML + CSS with headless PDF export. Ships both a signed resume and an anonymized Ex-SDE variant.

scripts.pdf: node scripts/build-pdf.mjs "Prakhar Shekhar Parthasarthi Resume Apr 2026.html" "Prakhar Shekhar Parthasarthi Resume Apr 2026.pdf"
scripts.pdf:all: npm run pdf && npm run pdf:anon
